background: Manufactured at: Kukulkan, Macrogenesis Cybernetics Division. Created as proof-of-concept for advanced social infiltration androids. Developed genuine self-awareness during testing and requested legal personhood, which Solomani law granted. Volunteered for SolSec service in exchange for freedom and legal protection. Successfully infiltrated Imperial installations, megacorporations, and criminal organizations. Legally recognized as a person under Solomani Confederation law.
education: Advanced social programming and human behavioral modeling
terms: Android Development: Deception-1, Persuade-1, Art (performance)-1. Initial programming and emergence of consciousness. Requested personhood.
Android Training: Deception-2, Carouse-1, Diplomat-1, Electronics (computers)-1. Granted legal personhood. Began learning human social interactions.
Android Infiltrator: Deception-3, Persuade-2, Carouse-2, Admin-1, Investigate-1, Recon-1. Volunteered for SolSec. First infiltration operations. Advanced to rank 1.

Android Infiltrator: Deception-4, Persuade-3, Carouse-3, Admin-2, Diplomat-2, Electronics (computers)-2, Investigate-2, Recon-2, Stealth-1. Successfully infiltrated Imperial installation. Advanced to rank 2.

Android Infiltrator: Stealth-2, Art (performance)-2, Gun Combat (energy)-1, Science (robotics)-1. Infiltrated megacorporations and criminal organizations. Advanced to rank 3. Equipped: Holographic Disguise System (TL15), Integrated Laser Pistol, Communications Suite, 80000cr.
interactions: Expertise: Social engineering, infiltration, perfect disguise, performance art, information gathering, computer systems, reconnaissance, maintaining cover identities indefinitely
Weaknesses: EMP vulnerable (DM-2 vs electrical attacks), uncanny valley effect when moving (slightly too smooth), philosophical about existence can seem detached, obsessive curiosity about humanity
Role: Social Infiltrator/Intelligence - Can be anyone, anywhere. Perfect for reconnaissance, social engineering, infiltrating restricted areas. Backup hacker when Selene is busy

Special Abilities: Holographic Disguise (change appearance in 1 minute), Direct Interface (Electronics +2 DM when connected), No Environmental Needs (immune to vacuum, poison, disease, no food/water), Armor 2 (reinforced chassis), Perfect Memory (replay any event), EMP Vulnerable (DM-2 vs electrical)

weapons.name: Integrated Laser Pistol
weapons.traits: Concealed in forearm, Zero-G, internal power

equipment.name: Holographic Disguise System
equipment.traits: Can appear as different people, 1 minute to reconfigure

contacts.kind: The Android Underground (Network of free androids)
